constraints: Entities must be concrete and implementation-ready
Do not emit placeholder or empty classes
Each module must include name, entities, relationships, required, and identity_keys
Entity names must be clean PascalCase identifiers
Field names must be clean snake_case identifiers
Relationships must be explicit and deterministic
Keep the model independent of physical .dce file paths
description: Generate implementation-ready DGCE core data models for the governed lifecycle. Output must define concrete entities with typed field objects, required flags, identity keys, and lifecycle relationships. The result should be suitable for downstream BaseModel generation, not placeholder classes.
requirements: Define the core DGCE entities such as SectionInput, PreviewArtifact, ReviewArtifact, ApprovalArtifact, PreflightRecord, ExecutionGate, AlignmentRecord, and ExecutionStamp
For each entity, emit field objects with name, type, required, and optional description
Include module-level required and identity_keys arrays
Include explicit relationships between lifecycle entities
Make output suitable for implementation-ready Pydantic BaseModel generation
Do not derive names from descriptions, field dumps, or storage-path text
Ensure deterministic structure and stable naming
title: DGCE Core Data Model
